decision.summary: No new action: the live 80k daily and 80k weekly already express the current upside continuation, and adding more exposure now would just chase extension into Beecthor's preferred shorting zone.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 78924.19, only 0.69% below the 24h high, with expanding open interest and shorts still dominant, so the squeeze structure is still alive. But the portfolio is already expressing that move through the active daily 80k reach on April 22 and the active weekly 80k reach on April 20-26, while the old weekly 72k dip remains discarded_for_slot and does not block anything. The latest Beecthor transcript from 2026-04-22 still frames the current 79.5k-80k area as the likely exhaustion / shorting zone unless the market keeps extending toward invalidation much higher, so forcing a second weekly upside trade here would be chasing a farther continuation after much of the move has already happened. The next weekly upside strike, 82k reach, only prices around 32% and sits below the preferred 45-84% band, while the nearest daily downside ideas are not showing a clean confirmed reversal yet with 6 hours left to close. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to hold the existing book and avoid opening a secondary slot just for extra exposure.
